mapper.sql: select id, site_id, master_article_id, relation_type, is_visible, is_top, is_recommend, custom_title, sort_order, view_count, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from gb_site_master_article_relations
mapper.select: select site_id from gb_site_master_article_relations where master_article_id = #{masterArticleId} and relation_type = 'exclude'
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_site_master_article_relations
site_id, master_article_id, relation_type, is_visible, is_top, is_recommend, custom_title, sort_order, view_count, remark, create_by, create_time,
#{siteId}, #{masterArticleId}, #{relationType}, #{isVisible}, #{isTop}, #{isRecommend}, #{customTitle}, #{sortOrder}, #{viewCount}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime},
mapper.delete: delete from gb_site_master_article_relations where site_id = #{siteId} and relation_type = 'exclude'
delete from gb_site_master_article_relations where master_article_id = #{masterArticleId} and relation_type = 'exclude'
